meta.name: passport-photo-specs
meta.description: Canonical passport, visa, and ID document photo specifications validated against official government sources
governmentSources: Canadian IRCC (Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada)
Australian Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade

documents.name: Passport
requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible
Face must cover 70 - 80% of the frame

documents.name: Visa
requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible

documents.name: Green Card
requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible

requirements: Plain cream or light grey background

No head covering (unless for religious reasons)

requirements: Plain cream or light grey background

requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible

documents.name: PCC (Police Clearance Certificate)
requirements: Size for PSK application in India: 35×45 mm
Size for US / UK / Canada visa applications via VFS: 51×51 mm (2×2 inch)
Both eyes open and clearly visible

documents.name: Driving License
requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible
Face centered, looking straight at camera
File size typically 20-50 KB for online RTO upload

documents.name: Voter ID
requirements: Both eyes open and clearly visible
Face centered, looking straight at camera
File size optimized for NVSP upload

documents.name: Schengen Visa
requirements: Plain white or very light grey background
Eyes open and clearly visible, looking at camera
Face must cover 70-80% of the frame
Ears visible (or at least both edges of the face)
No shadows on face or background
